steps.description: Click the prompt card labeled "Can you forecast the tomorrow weather in San Francisco for me?" in the vscuse_app_pULLRdev chatbot interface within Microsoft Teams (web version). The click is precisely targeted at the prompt card's text.

Press Enter key in the message input box of the "vscuse_app_pULLRdev" chat within the Microsoft Teams web interface to send the message "Can you forecast the tomorrow weather in San Francisco for me?".
Click the Chrome window close (X) button in the top-right corner to exit the Microsoft Teams web app interface.
